query:
SELECT 
  c.id,
  c.corretorId,
  u.name as corretorNome,
  c.valorVenda,
  c.createdAt
FROM contratos c
LEFT JOIN users u ON c.corretorId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Guilherme%'
  AND MONTH(c.createdAt) = 2
  AND YEAR(c.createdAt) = 2026
ORDER BY c.createdAt DESC;
